name: claw-sdk-workspace
description: Claw SDK — shared agent runtime and gateway for Supen and Ticos

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @tiwater/claw-gateway run build && pnpm --filter @tiwater/claw-sdk run build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @tiwater/claw-gateway run build && concurrently -n gateway,runner -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter @tiwater/claw-gateway run dev" "sleep 1 && pnpm --filter @tiwater/claw-sdk run dev"
